title: Counselor No-Show / Missed Orientation
desc: Your counselor missed a scheduled orientation or case meeting and follow-up went nowhere.
problemRouterLabel: My counselor missed an appointment or orientation

fields.name: timeOffImpact
fields.label: Work or school impact
fields.placeholder: e.g. Took PTO or missed class

errors: Missed orientations can delay entitlement, IPE approval, and term-start planning before any written denial exists.
A no-show becomes a stronger escalation issue when the veteran can document lost time, missed work, or continued silence afterward.

evidenceChecklist.text: Calendar invite, email, or Teams notice confirming the appointment
Screenshot or log showing you attended or were ready for the meeting
Follow-up emails or portal messages after the missed meeting
Short statement explaining work, school, or deadline harm
